g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does writing the compass file as a real document actually involve?')
g.text: Turn beliefs into a real file.
You own the truth. I draft the words.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does researching and writing the map actually involve — scope, structure, depth?')
g.text: I research + draft. You curate + validate.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the log entry structure look like — what fields, what format, what makes it multidimensional?')
g.text: You define what matters. I propose format.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the minimum viable engine script — what does it search, return, and feed into?')
g.text: Define what the first probe does.
You define intent. I design mechanism.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we capture this conversation as log entry 0 — what do we extract and preserve?')
g.text: I extract. You confirm what's essential.

svg.text: These tasks produce v0.1 of the living system — not the finished thing.
The system completes itself through use. Version 1.0 is earned, not designed.
